subject: Run end-to-end validation session
description:
Execute a real task session with all hardening features active to validate the complete pipeline works end-to-end.

**What to implement:**

1. Generate tasks from an existing spec using `/create-tasks` (with `produces_for` field)
2. Run `/execute-tasks` with all hardening features active
3. Verify each feature works in integration:
   - **File conflict detection**: Confirm conflicts logged in execution_plan.md, tasks rearranged
   - **Result validation hook**: Confirm validate-result.sh fires on result file writes, invalid files caught
   - **Progress streaming**: Confirm wave completion summaries visible to user
   - **Event-driven completion**: Confirm fswatch used (or polling fallback on systems without fswatch)
   - **Structured context**: Confirm execution_context.md has 6-section structure after merge
   - **Embedded agent rules**: Confirm agents don't read reference files explicitly
   - **Prompt injection**: Confirm produces_for results injected into dependent task prompts
   - **Adaptive polling**: Confirm fallback polling uses progressive intervals (if triggered)
   - **Retry escalation**: Trigger with intentionally failing task if feasible, or verify logic paths
   - **Merge validation**: Confirm post-merge validation runs without errors
4. Document results: pass/fail per feature, any issues discovered

**Files to read/verify (not modify):**
- Session directory files (execution_plan.md, execution_context.md, task_log.md, result files, context files)
- Hook debug logs (if AGENT_ALCHEMY_HOOK_DEBUG=1)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] Full execution session completes successfully
- [ ] All 10 hardening features verified as operational
- [ ] No regressions in existing behavior (wave execution, result processing, context merging)
- [ ] Session summary generated at end

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] At least one wave with multiple parallel tasks to test conflict detection
- [ ] At least one produces_for relationship to test prompt injection

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Any feature failure → document issue, note for follow-up fix

**Testing Requirements:**
• Integration: This IS the integration test
• Coverage: All 10 features validated in a single session

Source: internal/specs/execute-tasks-hardening-SPEC.md Section 10.3
